data.body: Fix max-lines, max-lines-per-function, and max-len ESLint warnings in UI panel components. Break large components into smaller sub-components or extract helper functions. Files: agent-history-view.tsx, terminal-panel.tsx, beat-table.tsx, lease-audit-view.tsx, interaction-picker.tsx, beat-columns.tsx, beat-detail-lightbox.tsx, history-debug-panel.tsx
data.title: Fix code style: components/ui-panels
